statement: In every magma, Equation 1194 (`x = y * ((z * (z * w)) * z)`) implies Equation 3339 (`x * y = x * (z * (w * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0230
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op z w)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op z (op w z)))
